blurb: A small crew handling the kind of jobs that need doing properly the first time.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: We've been on enough job sites to know what good work looks like — and what cutting corners ends up costing the customer six months later. We don't cut corners.
We show up when we say we will, we explain what we're doing in plain language, and we leave the place cleaner than we found it.

about.alt: The crew on a job site

services.name: Service Calls
services.description: Same-day or next-day visits for repairs and small jobs.

services.name: Installations
services.description: Quoted up-front, scheduled at your convenience, finished cleanly.

services.name: Maintenance
services.description: Seasonal check-ups that catch small issues before they get expensive.

testimonials.quote: Showed up on time, fixed it right, fair price. Hard to find these days.
testimonials.author: R. Coleman
